---
title: "Verification: {Short description of change}"
date: YYYY-MM-DD
categories: [verification]
status: in-progress
branch: "feature/branch-name"
pr: 0
---

<!--
TEMPLATE — copy this file to testing-log/{date}-{feature}.qmd when starting a pre-production
verification for a new feature branch. Fill in the placeholders, work through the steps in
order, and update `status:` to `pass` or `fail` before committing.

See docs/testing-workflow.qmd for instructions on when to create a verification notebook
and how to archive it after the PR merges.
-->

Brief description of what changed and why this verification is needed. One or two sentences.

---

## Summary Checklist

Fill in the **Result** column as you work through each step.

| # | Step | Environment | Pass criterion | Result |
|---|------|-------------|---------------|--------|
| 0 | `NXF_VER=24.10.5` pinned | local + HPC | `nextflow -version` shows 24.10.x | [ ] |
| 1a | stub-run `test` | local | exits 0 | [ ] |
| 1b | stub-run `test,docker` | local | exits 0 | [ ] |
| 1c | stub-run `test_variable` | local | exits 0 | [ ] |
| 2a | unit tests | local | no failures | [ ] |
| 2b | schema spot-check | R session | key assertions pass | [ ] |
| 3a | integration test `test` profile | local | all tests pass | [ ] |
| 3b | integration test `test_variable` | local | all tests pass | [ ] |
| 4a | HPC stub-run `test_hpc,rockfish` | Rockfish | exits 0 | [ ] |
| 4b | HPC integration test | Rockfish | all tests pass | [ ] |

---

## 0. Prerequisites

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
nextflow -version   # must show 24.10.x
```

---

## 1. Stub-runs (local)

Run before installing containers or generating pipeline data — fails immediately if Nextflow can't resolve channel wiring.

### 1a. Fixed architecture

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
nextflow run main.nf -profile test -stub-run
```

**Pass criterion:** exits 0, no `Missing output file` or `No such variable` errors.

### 1b. With Docker

```bash
nextflow run main.nf -profile test,docker -stub-run
```

### 1c. Variable architecture

```bash
nextflow run main.nf -profile test_variable -stub-run
```

*(Add additional profiles here if the change affects them.)*

---

## 2. Unit and Schema Tests

```bash
Rscript tests/run_tests.R
```

**Pass criterion:** no failures (integration tests auto-skip when `TEST_DB_DIR` is not set).

### 2b. Spot-check (add change-specific R assertions here)

```r
#| eval: false
source("R/utils.R")
source("R/io.R")
source("R/database.R")

# Add spot-checks specific to the change, e.g.:
# schema <- trait_metadata_schema()
# stopifnot("new_field" %in% schema$names)
# cat("PASS\n")
```

---

## 3. Integration Tests — Local

### 3a. Fixed architecture

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
bash tests/collect_test_data.sh --profile test

TEST_DB_DIR=tests/integration_data/test/db \
TEST_WORK_DIR=tests/integration_data/test/work \
TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test/simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
TEST_DB_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test/db_simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
Rscript tests/run_tests.R
```

Result:
```
```

### 3b. Variable architecture

```bash
bash tests/collect_test_data.sh --profile test_variable

TEST_DB_DIR=tests/integration_data/test_variable/db \
TEST_WORK_DIR=tests/integration_data/test_variable/work \
TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test_variable/simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
TEST_DB_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test_variable/db_simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
TEST_EXPECTED_MAPPINGS=256 \
Rscript tests/run_tests.R
```

Result:
```
```

---

## 4. Integration Tests — HPC (Rockfish)

See [HPC End-to-End Testing](../testing-hpc.qmd) for environment setup.

### 4a. Stub-runs on Rockfish

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
nextflow run main.nf -profile test_hpc,rockfish -stub-run
```

### 4b. Full HPC run

```bash
nextflow run main.nf \
  -profile test_hpc,rockfish \
  --legacy_assess \
  --output_dir Analysis_Results-verification \
  -work-dir /scratch4/eande106/${USER}/nf-work-verification
```

Result:
```
Completed at:
Duration    :
CPU hours   :
Succeeded   :
```

---

## Notes

<!-- Record any issues, unexpected behavior, or deviations from the standard workflow. -->
